name: Lemongrass Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice thin the bottom 8 inches of the lemongrass stalks.
2. Place the sliced lemongrass in a very clean 1-quart glass jar and gently bruise with a wooden spoon.
3. Add the rice vinegar to the jar.
4. Cover the jar with its lid and store it in a cool, dark place for at least 4 days, up to 2 weeks, depending on desired strength.
5. Strain the mixture through a fine sieve into a clean glass pitcher, discarding the lemongrass slices.
6. Pour the strained vinegar into two very clean half-pint glass jars and seal them with lids.
Date: Tue, 17 Aug 93 10:19:01 EDT

From the August issue of Gourmet magazine.
